features.name: packed struct assignment with default clause
features.description: Code should include a packed struct assignment using '{} syntax with a default clause on a struct with multiple members
features.snippet:
typedef struct packed { integer unsigned x; integer unsigned y; } foo_s;
localparam foo_s foo = '{ y: 1'b1, default: '0 };

features.name: enum shift in struct member assignment
features.description: Code should include an unsized enum shift expression used as a struct member value in a packed struct assignment with default clause
